property.name: AddInventoryComponent should create
property.value: AddInventoryComponent should create

property.name: AddInventoryComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs
property.value: AddInventoryComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: AddInventoryComponent should submit the form with valid inputs
property.value: AddInventoryComponent should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: AuthService should be created
property.value: AuthService should be created

property.name: AuthService saveToken() should store token in localStorage
property.value: AuthService saveToken() should store token in localStorage

property.name: AuthService getToken() should return stored token
property.value: AuthService getToken() should return stored token

property.name: AuthService getToken() should return null when no token stored
property.value: AuthService getToken() should return null when no token stored

property.name: AuthService getLoginStatus should return true when token exists
property.value: AuthService getLoginStatus should return true when token exists

property.name: AuthService getLoginStatus should return false when no token
property.value: AuthService getLoginStatus should return false when no token

property.name: AuthService SetRole() should store role in localStorage
property.value: AuthService SetRole() should store role in localStorage

property.name: AuthService getRole should return stored role
property.value: AuthService getRole should return stored role

property.name: AuthService logout() should clear token and role from localStorage
property.value: AuthService logout() should clear token and role from localStorage

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should create
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should create

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should submit the form with valid inputs
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should have name control as required
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should have name control as required

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should have price control as required
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should have price control as required

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should have description control as required
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should have description control as required

property.name: CreateProductsComponent should have stockQuantity control as required
property.value: CreateProductsComponent should have stockQuantity control as required

property.name: CreateProductsComponent form should be valid with all fields filled
property.value: CreateProductsComponent form should be valid with all fields filled

property.value: HttpService should get products by wholesaler

property.value: HttpService should get inventory by wholesalers

property.value: HttpService should get products by manufacturer

property.value: HttpService should place order

property.value: HttpService should update order status

property.value: HttpService should add consumer feedback

property.value: HttpService should create a product

property.value: HttpService should update a product

property.value: HttpService should update inventory

property.value: HttpService should login

property.value: HttpService should register user

property.value: HttpService should handle login error gracefully

property.name: HttpService should send correct headers for register user
property.value: HttpService should send correct headers for register user

property.name: HttpService should send correct body for add inventory
property.value: HttpService should send correct body for add inventory

property.name: HttpService should send correct body for update inventory
property.value: HttpService should send correct body for update inventory

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username and password are empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty
property.value: LoginComponent should have invalid form if username or password is empty

property.name: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent should have valid form if username and password are provided

property.name: LoginComponent should have password control with required validator
property.value: LoginComponent should have password control with required validator

property.name: LoginComponent should have username control with required validator
property.value: LoginComponent should have username control with required validator

property.name: LoginComponent form should be valid when both username and password are provided
property.value: LoginComponent form should be valid when both username and password are provided

property.name: LoginComponent form should remain invalid if only username is provided
property.value: LoginComponent form should remain invalid if only username is provided

property.name: LoginComponent form should remain invalid if only password is provided
property.value: LoginComponent form should remain invalid if only password is provided

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent should create
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should create

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should not submit the form with invalid inputs

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent should submit the form with valid inputs
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should submit the form with valid inputs

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent should have quantity control as required
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should have quantity control as required

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent should have status control as required
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent should have status control as required

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent form should be valid with quantity and status
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent form should be valid with quantity and status

property.name: PlaceOrderComponent form should be invalid when only quantity is set
property.value: PlaceOrderComponent form should be invalid when only quantity is set

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if any field is empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have invalid form if email is invalid

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have valid form if all fields are filled correctly

property.name: RegistrationComponent should have email control with email validator
property.value: RegistrationComponent should have email control with email validator

property.name: RegistrationComponent should mark form as valid when all fields are correct
property.value: RegistrationComponent should mark form as valid when all fields are correct

property.name: RegistrationComponent role control should be invalid when empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent role control should be invalid when empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent username control should be invalid when empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent username control should be invalid when empty

property.name: RegistrationComponent password control should be invalid when empty
property.value: RegistrationComponent password control should be invalid when empty
